text: I wish the works council can protect us better
author: an engineer

text: make sure that the works agreements are reviewed properly
author: A humble employee

text: foster more tolerance within teams, make the unbias training mandatory for everyone, more fairness in the evaluation and transparency in the promotion process.

I’d love to see more protection against reorganizations that feel like they’re targeting specific people. When there’s no clear business case behind these moves, it creates a lot of unease. Plus, if someone is laid off, the severance should reflect the current economic situation.
Change the performance evaluation framework to also favor and reward Employee growth not just the Business.
Much more fairness when determining the performance evaluation outcome
job protection, whether Zalando in the future can offer fully remote positions (especially for jobs that clearly dont require constant on-site presence), and more flexibility in working from abroad
equitable pay ! Close ALL the pay gaps!
A WoCo can actually set an exemplary stance against HR bullying so that HR cannot repeat this again.
A lot of our colleagues leave Zalando and rejoin only to adjust the pay gap. We need a way to fix the pay gap without workarounds
